Home.subtitleBold: Anyone can copy your name, your photos, your face — and pretend to be you online.
Home.subtitleRest: LiveID is the one link that proves the real you. Click it, and every fake falls apart.
Home.heroFootnote: Malaysians lose hundreds of millions to online scams every year — many of them run by people pretending to be someone real. This is how you prove the real one is you.
Home.sellerHeading: Your customers want proof you're real. Give it to them.
Home.sellerBody: A fake account with your photos can scam your own followers — and your name takes the blame. Your LiveID page is the one place that shows which accounts are truly yours. New customers click once and buy with confidence.
Home.everyoneBody: A verified LiveID protects anyone who's ever been doubted or copied — freelancers, public figures, content creators, or an ordinary person who just wants to prove they're real.
Home.premiumHeading: Grab these before someone else does.
Home.howHeading: Three steps. One link nobody can fake.
Home.step01Desc: Type any name. See if it's still available.
Home.step02Desc: A quick selfie. Takes 10 seconds. No IC needed.
Home.step03Desc: Share liveid.asia/yourname anywhere. One click tells the world the real one is you.
Home.whyStat: Anyone can pretend to be anyone online.
Home.whyBeat2: A fake account. Your photos. A different phone number. By the time you find out, someone has already been scammed in your name — and your money, or your reputation, is gone.
Home.whyBeat3: LiveID ends that. One link. Click it. Know instantly you're dealing with a real human being — not a bot, not a scammer, not a fake version of someone real.
Home.priceLine: From RM17.90 the first year. Renews at RM28/year. Your name is yours forever.
Home.footerLine2: liveid.asia is a product of AWAS Premium Resources. All rights reserved.

Verify.welcomeBody: Anyone can paste this link anywhere. Landing on this page does not confirm that the person messaging you is the owner of this handle.
Verify.welcomeInstruction: Please complete the checks below before you transact.
Verify.checkFaceBody: This is the verified face of {handle} during registration.
Verify.checkSocialTitle: Are you chatting from one of these accounts?
Verify.checkSocialBody: These are the social accounts registered by {handle}.
Verify.lookalikeWarning: Compare the username letter by letter. Scammers use lookalikes: @name_official, @nam0e, @name.my
Verify.checkWhatsappTitle: Is this the WhatsApp number they gave you?
Verify.checkWhatsappBodyPublic: This is the WhatsApp number registered by this handle.
Verify.checkWhatsappBodyPrivate: This handle keeps their number private. Paste the number you were given and we will tell you whether it belongs to this handle. We never show you their number.
Verify.matchNo: This number does NOT belong to {handle}.
Verify.matchNoBody: Whoever gave you this number is not the owner of this handle. Do not pay or send anything.
Verify.matchInvalid: That does not look like a Malaysian mobile number.
Verify.matchLimited: You have used all your checks for this handle today. Try again in 24 hours.
Verify.matchUnavailable: This handle has no registered WhatsApp number to check against.
Verify.matchRemaining: {count} check(s) left for this handle today.
Verify.verdictPass: You are dealing with the real {handle}.
Verify.verdictFail: Stop. Do not pay or send anything. You may be dealing with someone impersonating {handle}.
Verify.sealDesc: A unique cryptographic seal generated when this handle was issued. It is bound to this person's verified identity and cannot be forged or reused.
Verify.referralSubtitle: Get your own verified handle at liveid.asia
Verify.expiredMid: has not renewed their LiveID verification.
Verify.expiredPost: Do not accept this handle as proof of identity. An expired LiveID does not confirm who this person is.
Verify.notFoundPost: If someone gave you this link as proof of identity, they are not verified.
Verify.limitedIntro: {handle} is a verified real human with a sealed LiveID. But right now there is nothing on this page you can compare against the person messaging you.
Verify.limitedFaceLocked: Face — registered, but visible to LiveID members only
Verify.limitedAction: Ask {handle} to complete their LiveID page before you pay or send anything.
Verify.faceProtectedBody: {handle} has chosen to show their verified photo to LiveID members only. Anyone can see they are verified, but their face is not exposed to the open internet.
Verify.faceLoginButton: Log in to see the verified face
Verify.scopeDoes1: A real human passed a liveness check to open this handle.
Verify.scopeDoes2: The details on this page were registered by that account holder.
Verify.scopeNot1: LiveID does not verify that those details are true, and is not responsible for information entered by the handle owner.
Verify.scopeDecision: Use this page to help you decide. Do not rely on it alone.
Verify.verdictFailedBody: One of the details you were given does not belong to {handle}. Do not pay or send anything. You are likely dealing with someone impersonating this handle.

Terms.title: Terms & Conditions
Terms.s1b: LiveID is a product of AWAS Premium Resources (SSM Registration: 202603141446), a company registered in Malaysia. By registering for LiveID you agree to these Terms & Conditions in full. If you do not agree, do not register.
Terms.s2b:
LiveID is a verified human identity platform. On registration you are issued a unique handle (for example liveid.asia/yourname) which serves as your verified identity link.

Your handle is bound to a selfie taken under a liveness check at the moment you register, and sealed with a cryptographic signature generated at issue.

LiveID confirms two things and only two things:

• A real, living human passed a liveness check to open this handle
• The details shown on the page were entered by that account holder

LiveID does not verify that those details are true. See section 9.
Terms.s3b:
Your handle is licensed to you, not sold. It is non-transferable and cannot be resold.

It remains active while your subscription is valid. On expiry without renewal it may be deactivated, and your verification page will show as expired.

On account deletion your handle is permanently retired. Nobody can ever register it again, including you.
Terms.s4b:
Each person may hold only one LiveID account. Your selfie is checked against existing accounts at registration to enforce this.

Registering more than one account, or registering using someone else's face, is prohibited and will result in termination of all related accounts without refund.
Terms.s5h: 5. The Selfie Is Mandatory And Permanent
Terms.s5b:
A LiveID cannot be issued without a selfie. This is the core of the platform — a handle without a face proves nothing.

Your selfie cannot be changed after registration. A face that could be swapped later would let a verified account be handed to someone else, which is exactly what LiveID exists to prevent.

You choose whether your photograph is shown to everyone or only to logged-in LiveID members. That choice is yours and can be changed at any time.
Terms.s6h: 6. Your Details Are Yours To Provide
Terms.s6b:
Social account links, WhatsApp number and shop details are optional. You decide what to add and what to leave out.

You are responsible for the accuracy of everything you enter. Entering details that do not belong to you — someone else's phone number, or a social account you do not control — is prohibited and grounds for termination.

A page with nothing on it will still show you as a verified human, but visitors will be told plainly that the page cannot confirm which accounts belong to you.
Terms.s7b:
All payments are processed by ToyyibPay. Registration fees and handle fees are non-refundable once payment is processed. Renewal fees are non-refundable after payment.

Your subscription must be renewed annually to stay active. It is your responsibility to renew before your expiry date. We send a reminder email 14 days before expiry as a courtesy, but we are not liable for a lapse caused by failure to renew.

Fees are set out in your dashboard and may change for future renewal periods. You will be told before a changed fee applies to you.
Terms.s8b:
You must not:

• Use LiveID to impersonate another person
• Register details belonging to someone else
• Use the platform to commit or facilitate fraud
• Attempt to discover another member's private details, including by repeatedly testing numbers against a handle
• Interfere with, overload, or attempt to circumvent any limit on the platform

Breach of this section results in immediate termination without refund and may be reported to the relevant authorities.
Terms.s9b:
This section is important. Read it before you rely on any LiveID page.

LiveID reports what a handle owner registered. It does not investigate, endorse, or vouch for any person, business, product or transaction.

Specifically:

• A verified handle means a real human opened it. It does not mean that person is honest, solvent, or safe to deal with
• A number or account matching a handle confirms only that the owner registered it. It does not guarantee any transaction with that person will go well
• Anyone can paste a LiveID link anywhere. Landing on a verification page does not confirm that the person who sent you the link owns that handle
• We are not a party to any transaction between users, or between a user and anyone else

The checks on a verification page are a tool to help you decide. They are not a recommendation to transact and must not be treated as one. You remain fully responsible for your own dealings.
Terms.s10b:
To the fullest extent permitted by Malaysian law, AWAS Premium Resources is not liable for any loss or damage arising from:

• Your use of, or inability to use, LiveID
• Any transaction you enter into with any person, whether or not they hold a LiveID
• Details entered by a handle owner that turn out to be inaccurate
• Any decision you make based on a verification page
• Interruption, downtime or unavailability of the service

Where liability cannot lawfully be excluded, it is limited to the total fees you paid to us in the 12 months before the claim.

Nothing in these Terms excludes liability for fraud or for anything that cannot be excluded under Malaysian law.
Terms.s11b:
We may suspend or terminate any account at any time, without prior notice, where we determine these Terms have been breached. No refund is issued on termination for breach.

You may delete your account at any time from your dashboard. Deletion is permanent and cannot be reversed.
Terms.s12b:
These Terms are governed by the laws of Malaysia. Any dispute is subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Malaysian courts.

We may update these Terms at any time. The date at the top shows when they were last updated. Continued use after a change means you accept the updated Terms.

For any query regarding these Terms, contact hello@awas.asia.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.s1b:
AWAS Premium Resources (SSM Registration: 202603141446), Negeri Sembilan, Malaysia, is the data controller responsible for personal data collected through LiveID (liveid.asia).

For any data-related enquiry, or to exercise your rights under this policy, contact hello@awas.asia.
Privacy.s2b:
When you register for LiveID we collect:

• Phone number — used to log in, and as your account identifier
• Email address — used for account notices, renewal reminders and password reset
• Selfie photograph — captured at registration under a liveness check and stored as your permanent profile photo
• Full name or display name — optional, shown on your page if you provide it
• City and profession — optional

You may also choose to add:

• Links to your social media accounts — Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, X, YouTube, or a website
• A WhatsApp number — optional, and how it is used is your choice (see section 9b)
• Shop details — what you sell, your area, and a list of items, if you switch on the shop feature

We also record automatically:

• Verification page visits — IP address, browser user agent, referring URL and timestamp
• Number check attempts — IP address, the handle checked, whether the result was a match, and timestamp. This is recorded whether or not the person checking has a LiveID account.
Privacy.s3b:
Your personal data is collected only for these purposes:

• To confirm you are a real, living human being
• To create and maintain your unique LiveID handle
• To display your verified identity on your public verification page
• To let a visitor confirm whether contact details they were given belong to you
• To process your payment and send renewal reminders
• To detect impersonation, fraud, duplicate registrations and abuse of the platform

We do not sell your personal data. We do not use it for advertising. We do not share it with anyone except the service providers listed in section 5.
Privacy.s4b:
Under the Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (PDPA) Malaysia and its 2024 Amendment, your selfie photograph is sensitive personal data because it is a biometric identifier.

We collect and process it on the basis of your explicit consent, given by ticking the consent box at registration. A LiveID cannot be issued without a selfie — this is what makes the platform meaningful, and you are told so before you proceed.

All other data is collected on the basis of your consent, given when you enter it. You may withdraw consent at any time by deleting your account (section 7).
Privacy.s5b:
The following providers process data on our behalf. Each is bound to use it only to provide services to LiveID:

• Cloudinary (Cloudinary Ltd) — stores your selfie photograph
• Neon (Neon Inc) — hosts our database
• Render — hosts our application servers
• Vercel — hosts our website
• ToyyibPay — processes payments. Your card and banking details are handled entirely by ToyyibPay and never reach LiveID
• Resend — delivers our emails

Some of these providers store data outside Malaysia. By using LiveID you consent to this transfer.
Privacy.s6b:
We keep your data as follows:

• Account data, profile and photograph — for as long as your account is active, then one (1) year after expiry or deletion
• Verification page visit logs — 12 months
• Number check logs — 12 months
• Transaction records — 7 years, as required by Malaysian tax and accounting law

When you delete your account:

• Your selfie is permanently deleted from Cloudinary
• Your profile, social links, WhatsApp number and shop items are permanently deleted
• Your handle is permanently retired and can never be registered again by anyone, including you
Privacy.s7b:
You have the right to:

• Access — request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
• Correct — fix anything inaccurate or incomplete, most of which you can edit yourself in your dashboard
• Withdraw consent — delete your account at any time from your dashboard. This is permanent
• Limit processing — choose what is shown on your page, including whether your photograph is public and how your WhatsApp number is used
• Data portability — request your data in a structured format

To exercise any right that is not already a button in your dashboard, email hello@awas.asia. We will respond within 21 days as required by law.
Privacy.s8b: If a personal data breach occurs that is likely to cause you significant harm, we will notify the Personal Data Protection Commissioner within 72 hours of becoming aware of it, as required under the PDPA 2024 Amendment, and notify affected users as soon as practicable.
Privacy.s9b:
Your selfie is used for one thing: as the verified face shown on your LiveID page, so that someone dealing with you can see whether the person contacting them is you.

We do not run facial recognition on it. We do not match it against any database. We do not share it with any third party other than Cloudinary, which stores it for us.

It cannot be changed after registration. This is deliberate — a face that can be swapped later would defeat the purpose of the platform. It is permanently deleted when you delete your account.
Privacy.s9ab:
You choose, in your dashboard:

• LiveID members only (default) — anyone can see that you are verified, but your face is shown only to people logged in to a LiveID account
• Everyone — your face is shown to any visitor, including people who are not logged in and search engines

When a logged-in member views another member's page, we record the viewing member's ID, the handle viewed, the time and the IP address. This is used only to investigate fraud and abuse. It is not disclosed to the person being viewed.
Privacy.s9bb:
Providing a WhatsApp number is optional. If you provide one, we store it twice: exactly as you typed it, and in a standardised form used only for matching. You choose how it is used:

• Check only (default) — your number is never shown to anyone. A visitor who was given a number can type it in and is told only whether it belongs to your handle. Your number is never sent to their browser
• Show it on my page — your number is displayed on your verification page to everyone, including visitors who are not logged in and search engines. Choose this only if you are comfortable with your number being public
• Do not use it — your number is stored but never shown and never checked

You are shown what each option means at the moment you choose it, and you can change it at any time in your dashboard.
Privacy.s9cb:
A visitor to a verification page can test a number they were given against that handle. This exists so that someone who was sent a phone number by a stranger claiming to be you can find out whether it is really yours.

The check is deliberately narrow:

• It requires both a handle and a number. There is no way to ask who a number belongs to
• The answer is only yes or no. We never reveal a number, a name, or who a number belongs to
• It is limited to 2 attempts per handle, per person, per day

Because the person checking must already have the number, the check discloses nothing they did not already possess.

We log each attempt — the handle, the IP address, whether it matched, and the time — for 12 months. This is used only to enforce the limit and to detect someone being impersonated. It is recorded even if the person checking does not have a LiveID account.
Privacy.s10b:
LiveID uses a first-party cookie (liveid_ref) to remember a referral code for up to 30 days, so the correct referral partner is credited.

We store your login session in your browser so you stay logged in.

We do not use third-party tracking cookies, advertising trackers or analytics that profile you across other websites.
Privacy.s11b: LiveID is not intended for anyone under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from children. If you believe a child has registered, contact hello@awas.asia and we will delete the account.
Privacy.s12b:
We may update this policy as the platform changes. Significant changes will be notified by email. The date at the top shows when it was last updated. Continued use after a change means you accept the updated policy.

For any privacy enquiry, data access request, or to exercise your PDPA rights, contact our Data Protection Officer at:

hello@awas.asia
AWAS Premium Resources (202603141446)
Negeri Sembilan, Malaysia

Dashboard.expiredNote: Anyone clicking your link now sees an Expired notice. Your handle is still yours — renew to restore your verification.
Dashboard.emptyDirect: No direct earnings yet. Share your referral link to start earning.
Dashboard.strengthCompleteBody: Your verification page is complete. Buyers can check your face, your accounts and your number.
Dashboard.strengthIncompleteBody: Being verified is not the same as having a page a buyer can use. Here is what a visitor can check on your page right now.
Dashboard.strengthVerified: Verified human — liveness checked at registration
Dashboard.strengthPhotoNo: No face photo — buyers cannot compare your face
Dashboard.strengthSocialNo: No social accounts — buyers cannot check which accounts are yours
Dashboard.strengthWhatsappNo: No WhatsApp — buyers cannot check a number they were given

Profile.profilePhotoDesc: Your profile photo is your verified selfie taken during registration. It cannot be changed.
Profile.whoCanSee: Who can see your verified photo?
Profile.membersOnlyRest: — anyone can see you are verified, but only logged-in members see your photo.
Profile.everyoneRest: — your photo shows to any visitor. Recommended if people need to recognise you before they transact.
Profile.displayNamePlaceholder: How you want to be known
Profile.myShopDesc: Turn this on to show what you sell on your verified page. Buyers see your shop after they confirm you are real.
Profile.turnOnShopRest: — off means your page stays a plain verified profile.
Profile.shopTitlePlaceholder: Used Cars — Seremban / Takaful Agent / Homemade Kuih
Profile.shopAboutPlaceholder: A short line about your business
Profile.saveFirstNote: Save this page first, then add the items you sell.
Profile.deleteWarnPre: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Your handle
Profile.deleteWarnPost: will be retired forever and cannot be claimed by anyone else. All your data will be deleted.
Profile.modalWarnPre: You are about to permanently delete your LiveID account. Your handle
Profile.modalWarnPost: will be retired forever. This cannot be undone.
Profile.photoTip: Sellers: showing your photo to everyone makes your page far harder to fake. A buyer who can see your face knows instantly if the person messaging them is someone else.
Profile.socialLinksDesc: These are shown on your verification page so buyers can confirm which accounts are really yours. Social profiles are already public, so nothing new is exposed.
Profile.waDesc: Optional. Your number is the one detail here that is not already public somewhere else, so you choose how it is used.
Profile.waWhoCanSee: How should your number be used?
Profile.waModeMatchRest: — nobody is ever shown your number. A buyer who was given a number can test it and is told yes or no. Recommended.
Profile.waModePublicRest: — your number is displayed to everyone, including visitors who are not logged in. Easiest for buyers to reach you.
Profile.waModeHiddenRest: — your number is stored but never shown and never checked. Buyers contact you through your other links.
Profile.waNoticePublic: Your number will be visible to anyone who opens your verification page, including people who are not logged in and search engines. Only choose this if you are comfortable with your number being public.
Profile.waNoticeMatch: Your number is never displayed to anyone. Visitors can only confirm whether a number they already have belongs to you. Limited to 2 checks per person per day.
Profile.waNoticeHidden: Your number stays private and no check is offered on your page.
